subject: A young woman reaches toward a massive supernatural bloom of energy erupting from a wallpapered surface, surrounded by ghostly hands
description: A young woman with braided hair and a yellow garment extends her arm toward the right side of the frame where an enormous burst of electric pink-magenta energy erupts in a feathered or coral-like shape. The energy tears through what appears to be a wallpapered interior surface, and ghostly hands reach out from within or beyond it. The room is saturated in sickly green light with chain-like shapes visible on the ceiling and suggestion of hands or silhouettes in the background. The woman's expression is one of awe, shock, or compulsion. The energy bloom dominates the right two-thirds of the composition — she is reaching into it, or being pulled toward it.
foreground: Young woman with braided hair extending arm toward bursting pink-magenta energy bloom
background: Sickly green wallpapered interior with ghostly hands and chain-like ceiling elements
emotion: awe mixed with compulsion or terror, arm extended as if unable to resist
